Footer.tagline: Curated Photobooth Experiences for the Refined.

Home.heroDesc: A highly curated, tactile photobooth experience designed for elegant gatherings. We capture fleeting moments and render them permanent through archival-quality prints and minimalist aesthetics.
Home.experienceDesc: Step into a curated space designed to flatter. Our lighting is sculpted to mirror high-end fashion editorials, while our proprietary processing mimics the rich, tactile quality of analog film.
Home.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to receive musings on modern aesthetics, early access to new studio installations, and exclusive booking windows.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio.
Portfolio.desc: A curation of moments. Authentic, unscripted, and eternally elegant.

Services.title: Services & Pricing.
Services.desc: Invest in moments that matter. Our packages are designed to provide a seamless, high-end experience from the first consultation to the final archival print.
Services.tier1Desc: Perfect for intimate gatherings and private celebrations.
Services.tier2Desc: Our most popular offering, designed for weddings and grand events.
Services.tier3Desc: A fully bespoke experience tailored to your exact creative vision.
Services.faq1Q: Do you travel outside of Jakarta?
Services.faq1A: Yes, we are available for commissions worldwide. Travel and accommodation fees apply for events outside the Greater Jakarta area.
Services.faq2Q: How far in advance should we book?
Services.faq2A: We recommend booking at least 3-6 months in advance, especially for weekend dates during peak wedding season, to ensure availability.
Services.faq3Q: Can we customize the photo template?
Services.faq3A: Absolutely. Our design team will work with you to create a minimalist, elegant layout that perfectly aligns with your event's aesthetic and branding.

Contact.title: Inquiries.
Contact.desc: We accept a limited number of commissions each year to ensure the highest level of dedication to each event. Please share the details of your gathering, and we will be in touch shortly.
Contact.details: Share the details of your vision
